profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Prima Multi Usaha Indonesia Tbk engages in telecommunications distribution and management activities in Indonesia. The company operates through the Telecommunication Services, Food and Beverages, and Care Products segments. It sells mobile phone accessories, such as data cables, chargers, power banks, headsets, and Bluetooth speakers under the PHILIPS and VDENMENV brands. PT Prima Multi Usaha Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1998 and is based in Cirebon, Indonesia.
